name: Summer Pasta with Pesto

ingredients.item: small new potatoes, peeled, cooked, and halved

method: Melt butter in a large skillet and sauté onion over medium heat for 5 minutes. Add ham, peas, potatoes and pesto
Cook fettuccine according to package directions; drain. Place hot pasta in a large, heated serving bowl.
Add the potato-pesto mixture and toss gently to mix. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve.
The sauce is boiled with a mixture of onions, carrots, celery, and olive oil. The garlic and red pepper are added to
the mix, along with tomatoes and oregano. It can also contain sugar or wine, depending on personal preference.
Pepperoni slices are often added for flavor before it's poured over cooked pasta noodles.
